allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node, npm, npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source; Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs"; Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\npm"; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm"; Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\nodejs"; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Volta")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Programs" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; winget list --id OpenJS.NodeJS 2>$null | Select-Object -Last 3)

PowerShell($dir = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\node-portable"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $dir | Out-Null; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://nodejs.org/dist/v22.12.0/node-v22.12.0-win-x64.zip" -OutFile "$dir\\node.zip" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "downloaded $\(\(Get-Item "$dir\\node.zip"\).Length\) bytes")
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\node-portable\\node-v22.12.0-win-x64;$env:Path"; npm run build -w apps/bigtinygames/client; Write-Output "exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(Get-Command chromium-cli, playwright -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source; Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\ms-playwright")

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\node-portable\\node-v22.12.0-win-x64;$env:Path"; $tools = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\claude-tools\\pw"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $tools | Out-Null; Set-Location $tools; if \(-not \(Test-Path "$tools\\node_modules\\playwright-core"\)\) { npm init -y | Out-Null; npm i playwright-core --no-audit --no-fund 2>$null }; Write-Output "ready: $\(Test-Path "$tools\\node_modules\\playwright-core"\)")

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\node-portable\\node-v22.12.0-win-x64;$env:Path"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:5173 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "vite: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $h = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3004/api/health -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "api: $\($h.Content\)")
